talk_metadata.talk_title: Spatial Metabolomics and Immune Profiling Using Implantable Microdevices
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: we don't fully understand why some patients escaped
Skipped OS data entirely, presented only PFS

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Redundant nutrient uptake pathways beyond macropinocytosis

key_data_gaps: No in vivo efficacy data presented
No comparison to standard of care

crispro_opportunity.description: Identify alternative nutrient acquisition pathways that compensate for macropinocytosis inhibition.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker noted that macropinocytosis inhibition with EIPA decreased amino acids but did not fully abolish tumor growth.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model metabolic network rewiring and predict compensatory pathways for targeted intervention.

crispro_opportunity.description: Develop metabolite-based signatures to predict immune cell states and drug response.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker demonstrated logistic regression models predicting immune neighborhoods from metabolite data.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's machine learning framework can integrate metabolomic and spatial data to generate predictive biomarkers.

unresolved_questions: What are the specific alternative nutrient uptake mechanisms that sustain tumor growth when macropinocytosis is blocked?
Can metabolite signatures reliably predict response across diverse tumor types?
